head_preview.sentence: The birch canoe slid on the smooth planks.
head_preview.translation: On the smooth planks, the birch canoe slid.
head_preview.translation_extra: On the smooth planks, the birch canoe slid. Yes, hrrrm.

head_preview.sentence: Glue the sheet to the dark blue background.

head_preview.sentence: It's easy to tell the depth of a well.
